understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through KA59’s levels by arranging the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied at the same time; completing a level when all goals are covered and ultimately winning the run when the final level reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_* actions to shift the currently selected piece on a grid where each cell corresponds to 3-pixel increments in [x,y] coordinates; walls generally block movement, while pushable blocks can be moved if they are directly adjacent in the movement direction and have space to slide. When multiple selectables exist, control is switched via CLICK on the selectable’s exact pixel/grid position from the state (not semantic grid indices). The movement_blocked flags act as hints about adjacency but don’t fully determine whether a move will succeed due to special interactions with boundaries/objects.
